sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, time_col TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, time_col) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-03-07 12:00:00+00');
SELECT id, time_col, isfinite(time_col) FROM test_timestamps;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET time_col = TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 10:00:00+00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, isfinite(TIMESTAMPTZ 'infinity') AS is_infinite FROM test_timestamps;
